texto: Very frequently feminine activity also expresses itself in what is largely a retrospectively oriented pondering over what we ought to have done differently in life and how we ought to have done it or as if under compulsion we make up strings of causal connections. We like to call this thinking though on the contrary it is a form of mental activity that is strangely pointless and unproductive a form that really leads only to self-torture.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Emma Jung: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Very frequently feminine activity also expresses itself in what is largely a retrospectively orie…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, regrets, activity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
